abilities.name: Psychic Wing
abilities.text: If Vibrava has any Psychic Energy attached to it, Vibrava's Retreat Cost is 0.

attacks.name: Quick Blow
attacks.text: Flip a coin. If heads, this attack does 30 damage plus 20 more damage.

tests.name: psychic_wing_retreat
tests.description: Test that Psychic Wing makes retreat free with Psychic Energy

tests.name: quick_blow_coin_flip
tests.description: Test that Quick Blow does +20 on heads
